English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell Club of Maryland records
Cornell Club of Maryland
41-6-3953
3.3 cubic feet. 3.3 cubic feet.
[ca. 1940-2003] Correspondence, printed material Includes meeting minutes; subject files, including materials on activities and scholarships; newsletters; and files from the earlier separate Cornell Women's Club of Maryland. Collection material in English 7573355
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
February 2012
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, February 2012
Date modified:
RMC Staff, February 2012
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Contains information from over 60 years about the Cornell Club of Maryland. Includes meeting minutes, information on clubs, activities and scholarships that the Club was involved in, including parties and alumni get-togethers. Also has lists of members throughout the years, and different descriptions of Cornell throughout the years.
Cite As:
Cornell Club of Maryland records, #41-6-3953. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cornell University -- : Alumni and alumnae. Cornell Women\'s Club of Maryland
